name: TON Strategy Co
business: TON Strategy Company is a digital asset treasury and Web3 ecosystem company focused on supporting The Open Network. The company manages its corporate treasury holdings of Toncoin, including staking to earn rewards. It also operates MARKET.live, a livestream shopping platform; LyveCom, an AI video commerce software provider; and Go Fund Yourself, a social crowdfunding platform.

exposures.sentence: The Company s core business is the management of its corporate treasury holdings of Toncoin ( TON or Toncoin ), the native digital asset of the TON blockchain.
The Company formally commenced staking operations in August of 2025.

MARKET.live is a multi-vendor livestream shopping platform that merges e-commerce and entertainment, enabling brands, retailers, and creators to broadcast shoppable events simultaneously across major social and video channels.
LyveCom, an artificial intelligence (AI) driven video commerce platform, pursuant to a stock purchase agreement dated April 11, 2025.
Go Fund Yourself is an interactive social crowdfunding platform that provides public and private companies with broad-based exposure for their Regulation CF and Regulation A offerings.

catalysts.event: Completed private investment in public equity (PIPE)
catalysts.sentence: On August 7, 2025, the Company completed a private investment in public equity ( PIPE ) with certain institutional investors (the PIPE Subscribers ) pursuant to a subscription agreement.

catalysts.event: Announced start of TON Treasury Strategy
catalysts.sentence: On August 21, 2025, the Company announced the start of its TON Treasury Strategy and used the net proceeds from the PIPE to acquire Toncoin.
The Company formally commenced staking operations in August of 2025.
In April 2025, the Company consummated its acquisition of LyveCom, an artificial intelligence (AI) driven video commerce platform, pursuant to a stock purchase agreement dated April 11, 2025.
